title: Chicken / Dino Nuggets
description: Ever wanted Chicken Nuggets & Dino Nuggets in Minecraft if so this is the mod for you!
body:
Chicken / Dino Nuggets Mod

Hello all, this is my first mod and I figured I would release it.

What does it add?

- Raw Chicken Nugget
- Cooked Chicken Nugget
- Raw Dino Nugget
- Cooked Dino Nugget
- Dino Cutter

Crafting Recipe Examples:

![GitHub Light](https://i.imgur.com/SG2FOIA.gif)

Chicken / Dino Nuggets (Fabric 1.18.2) Minecraft Mod


What I have planned:

I will be adding better textures and a more variety of Dino Nuggets.

Please only download from Trusted Sources I.E Planet Minecraft, CurseForge.

If the mod is located on other sources it has been uploaded without my permission and could possibly be malicious.
